sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Looking at the image, all 4 center dots are now painted: [b, N, Y, p] which matches the top row! The bottom squares are all gray now (consumed). The level is not yet completed though - I need to figure out what triggers level completion. Maybe I need to press SPACE or click somewhere to submit/confirm the solution. Let me check the current state more carefully and try SPACE to see if it completes the level.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# All 4 dots painted to match top: [b, N, Y, p] ✓
# Bottom squares all gray (consumed)
# Level not completed yet - need to trigger completion
# Try SPACE to submit/confirm

result = action(['SPACE'])
print(f"SPACE result: level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}, done={last_action_result.get('done', False)}")

# Check if anything changed
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Center dots:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if 28 <= n['boundary'][0][0] <= 31 and n['pixels'] == 4:
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, col={n['boundary'][0][1]}")

# Check bottom
bottom = []
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if 54 <= n['boundary'][0][0] <= 63 and n['pixels'] == 16:
        bottom.append((n['color'], n['boundary'][0][1]))
bottom.sort(key=lambda x: x[1])
print(f"Bottom: {bottom}")
</parameter>
<parameter=world_model>
{"game_tier": {"action_semantics": {"SPACE": "Shifts bottom row colors left, timer shrinks. May also submit solution.", "MOUSE": "Select bottom color, then click center dot to paint it (consumes color)"}, "object_taxonomy": {"top_panel": "4 colored squares (b, N, Y, p) - target pattern", "center_panel": "red rectangle with 4 dots to paint", "bottom_panel": "4 colored squares - paint palette", "timer_bar": "gray line at row 53"}, "hud_map": {"timer_bar": "row 53"}, "win_pattern": {"paint_center_dots": "Match top row colors, then submit"}, "level_log": {}, "cross_level_notes": {}}, "level_tier": {"world_model": "All 4 center dots painted [b, N, Y, p] matching top. Bottom all gray. Need to submit.", "goal_model": "Submit completed painting to finish level", "recent_findings": ["All dots painted correctly", "Level not auto-completed"], "open_questions": ["What action submits the solution?"], "current_plan": "Try SPACE to submit, or try clicking center area", "strategy_log": [], "failed_probes": ["ACTION7", "Clicking two squares to swap"]}}
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
